violations.text: Cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, allergens, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Per PIC, cookies will no longer be available for the customers to grab. Cookies were relocated behind the counter. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024

The floors in the basement area has an small accumulation of rodent droppings behind equipment. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
